steps.title: Read two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit rises gently. Two clear approximate points on the line are $(0,2.5)$ and $(10,4.7)$. Use points on the fit line itself, not random scatterplot points.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: $$m=\frac{4.7-2.5}{10-0}=\frac{2.2}{10}=0.22$$ The slope is positive because the line rises from left to right.

steps.title: Eliminate by sign and size
steps.content: Choices A and B are negative, but the line has positive slope. Choice D, $2.45$, is much too steep for a line that rises only about $2.2$ units over $10$ units of run. Choice C, $0.22$, is correct.
